AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.title: Misfortune
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.descript:
Takes additional damage from [gold]Unfortunate[/gold] Attacks.
Halves at the end of the enemy turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.smartDes:
Takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage from [gold]Unfortunate[/gold] Attacks.
Halves at the end of the enemy turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.title: Goof
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.description: When you obtain [blue]10[/blue] or more [gold]Goof[/gold], lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}, and Draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.smartDescripti:
When you obtain [blue]10[/blue] or more [gold]Goof[/gold], lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, and Draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
([blue]{Amount}[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue] obtained.)
